_meta.summary: CUDA kernels assume blockDim.x == D; D>1024 exceeds max threads/block

symptom: cuLaunchKernelEx error 1 (CUDA_ERROR_INVALID_VALUE) with shmem=8192 at D=2048. All rms_norm, softmax, fused, ce_loss kernels fail. Training crashes at step 1.
root_cause: Kernel source assumes 1 thread per element (threadIdx.x == element index). Launch wrappers pass D as blockDim.x. At D=2048, blockDim.x=2048 > CUDA max 1024 threads/block.
affected_kernels: softmax_rows_fwd (C as blockDim, C=VOCAB=256 OK but C=D fails)

fix.kernel_source: Replace threadIdx.x direct indexing with stride loop: for(int i=tid; i<D; i+=blockDim.x)
fix.shared_memory: shmem = blockDim.x * sizeof(float), NOT D * sizeof(float) — blockDim.x suffices for reduction

remaining: rms_norm_bwd, softmax_bwd, ce_loss_grad, 6 fused kernels — agent fixing
d2048_status: launch error fixed, kernel correctness TBD after stride loop complete
